title: coelophragmus auriculatus var. lobatus
intro: Coelophragmus auriculatus var. lobatus, also known as the lobed gilia or ear-leaved gilia, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Coelophragmus auriculatus var. lobatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
